name: Cable
text: I honor the relationships and connections I have made in life, both internally and externally

name: Chronicle
text: I take note of what is happening around me and communicate that as authentically as possible

name: Circuit
text: I see connections, realize the cyclical and periodic nature of life's journeys, and understand how they are all connected

name: Civic
text: I think personal duty to others is critical; I feel a responsibility to create more value for the world than I extract

name: Eureka
text: I consistently surprise myself by accomplishing things I previously believed I could not

name: Field
text: I embrace the principles of nurture and growth through teamwork, perseverance, and preparedness  – a blade of grass does not make a field, but many blades together do

name: Gate
text: I see myself moving in an endless cycle forward — continuously improving towards the next goal, the next dream, the next level, the next gate

name: Hunter
text: I use my intuition to guide me through uncertainty and am constantly hunting down my goals

name: Labyrinth
text: I appreciate the intrinsic value of the journey itself, with all of its wrong turns and out-of-the-way stops

name: Lands
text: I develop a better understanding of both familiar and foreign lands, through deep cultural immersion

name: Laurel
text: I constantly ask questions and explore new ideas — never resting on my laurels

name: Legion
text: I take up arms for causes I choose to dedicate myself to, and work with others to achieve victory

name: Liberty
text: I seek to understand the role freedom plays in each of our lives, considering what aspects of life make me feel most vital, capable, and effective

name: Mason
text: I commit to working hard to accomplish shared goals, exploring common interests with those around me, and embracing lifelong learning

name: Mission
text: I focus on finding my personal mission—that which engenders the strongest connection I can feel to the world

name: North
text: I put faith in a future unrealized and look beyond what is immediately evident

name: Ocean
text: I search for both breadth, the examination of vast expanses, and depth, exploration far beyond what can be immediately seen on the surface

name: Octagon
text: I strive for balance and harmony among the various aspects of life

name: Pier
text: I stand for the conviction I build before embarking on a journey into the boundless ocean, accompanied by the promise of a future of my own making

name: Plaza
text: I step out of my comfort zone as a way to welcome others into my life

name: Pyramid
text: I build my core identity through intentional reflection and introspection

name: Reserve
text: I recognize the distinction between those things that may seem necessary but need not be kept, and those that appear unnecessary but are actually essential to retain

name: Tower
text: I abandon fear and climb down to look beyond pleasant views. Then embrace courage and climb up again

name: Union
text: I understand "union" as more than just an act of meeting. It is a connection, a binding force, a loyalty, and a meeting of profundity

name: Vista
text: I draw on my personal narrative, by taking snapshots of my life over time, being attentive to details, and staying open to change

name: Civic Responsibility
text: I take initiative to make a positive impact on communities, understanding local and global challenges, and feeling a responsibility to improve the lives of others.

name: Intercultural Competency
text: I understand myself and others as cultural beings, adapting to new environments, and building meaningful relationships across different cultures.

name: Interpersonal Engagement
text: I use self-awareness and emotional intelligence to communicate effectively, understand my impact on others, and build healthy relationships.

name: Professional Development
text: I develop the skills and mindset for a meaningful career, understanding my strengths and values, and actively pursuing professional goals.

name: Self-Management and Wellness
text: I practice healthy habits, managing stress and emotions effectively, and building resilience to lead a balanced and fulfilling life.
